telecom.headline_en: Strengthened scrutiny for telecom ownership changes
summary_en: New law requires government approval for ownership changes.
Aimed at enhancing transparency and preventing issues.
Triggered by past ownership transitions in telecom sector.

impact.rationale_en: The new law increases regulatory scrutiny, raising risks for foreign companies.

korean_quote.text_ko: 비자발적으로 대주주가 된 경우에도 정부 인가를 받아야 한다.
korean_quote.text_en: Even those who become a major shareholder involuntarily must obtain government approval.
korean_quote.source_title: 이훈기 의원 "기간통신사업자 지배구조 투명성 제고 법안 국회 통과" : 네이트 뉴스

broadcasting.headline_en: Broadcasting Law Amendments Passed in Korea
summary_en: A bill to enhance universal viewing rights has passed.
It mandates fair distribution of broadcasting rights.
New regulations may impact foreign media companies.

impact.rationale_en: The passage of the bill increases regulatory scrutiny on broadcasting rights, affecting foreign entrants.

korean_quote.text_ko: '보편적 시청권 강화' 방송법 개정안, 과방위 전체회의 통과
korean_quote.text_en: The Broadcasting Act amendment to "strengthen universal viewing rights" clears the full Science, ICT & Broadcasting Committee.
korean_quote.source_title: '보편적 시청권 강화' 방송법 개정안, 과방위 전체회의 통과 | 연합뉴스

aviation.headline_en: Regulatory review of foreign investment in aviation
summary_en: Korean legislative body reviews foreign investment regulations.
Concerns raised about MBK Partners' foreign ownership.
New amendments proposed to enhance consumer protection.

impact.rationale_en: The review of foreign investment regulations could increase scrutiny and risk for foreign entrants.

korean_quote.text_ko: 입법조사처, "MBK의 외국인 투자 여부 확인 필요"
korean_quote.text_en: Legislative research service: "It must be verified whether MBK qualifies as foreign investment."

news_media.headline_en: Proposed bill targets foreign news service registration
summary_en: A bill aims to strengthen registration for foreign news providers.
It requires foreign entities to register local representatives.
The bill is currently under committee review.

impact.rationale_en: The proposed bill increases regulatory obligations for foreign news services.

korean_quote.text_ko: 해외 업체가 국내에서 뉴스를 제공할 때 국내 담당자나 대리인 정보를 등록하게 함으로써 책임을 강화함
korean_quote.text_en: Foreign firms providing news in Korea must register a local manager or agent, strengthening accountability.
korean_quote.source_title: 신문 등의 진흥에 관한 법률 일부개정법률안 - Uisadang

power.headline_en: Korea's Energy Market Faces Major Regulatory Changes
summary_en: New laws aim to diversify power market transactions.
Private access to the national power grid approved.
Legislation supports renewable energy integration.

impact.rationale_en: The introduction of new laws and regulations indicates a shift that may complicate market entry for foreign companies.

korean_quote.text_ko: 전력 정책 전반에 거대한 패러다임 변화가 예고됐다.
korean_quote.text_en: A sweeping paradigm shift across power policy has been signaled.
korean_quote.source_title: 사상 첫 전력망 민간 개방·RPS 폐지 상임위 통과…"에너지 대전환 시동"

defense.headline_en: New regulations for foreign staff in defense firms
summary_en: South Korea will require approval for hiring foreign staff.
This includes dual-national employees in defense companies.
The changes aim to prevent technology leaks and protect national security.

impact.rationale_en: The new approval requirements for foreign hires increase regulatory hurdles for foreign companies.

korean_quote.text_ko: 방위사업법 및 방위산업기술 보호법 개정안이 2026. 3. 10. 입법화되어 2026. 9. 11.부터 시행됩니다.
korean_quote.text_en: Amendments to the Defense Acquisition Act and the Defense Technology Protection Act were enacted on Mar 10, 2026 and take effect Sep 11, 2026.
korean_quote.source_title: 방위사업법, 방위산업기술 보호법 개정 < 대륙아주 < Into the Lawfirm < 로캣센터 < 기사본문 - 법률신문

fintech.headline_en: New regulations enhance fintech oversight in Korea
summary_en: Korean National Assembly passed amendments to the Electronic Financial Transactions Act.
New rules aim to protect settlement funds and enhance management oversight.
Changes include higher capital requirements for large payment gateway operators.

impact.rationale_en: The new regulations increase oversight and compliance requirements for fintech companies.

korean_quote.text_ko: PG업 정산자금을 선불충전금과 동일한 방법으로 외부관리하도록 규율
korean_quote.text_en: PG (payment-gateway) settlement funds must be externally managed in the same way as prepaid charge balances.

sources.title: 보도자료 - 금융위원회

ecommerce.headline_en: KFTC proposes amendments to e-commerce regulations
summary_en: KFTC announced draft amendments to the E-Commerce Act.
New regulations clarify domestic agent designation for overseas businesses.
Increased penalties for repeat offenders are also proposed.

impact.rationale_en: The proposed amendments increase regulatory requirements for foreign e-commerce businesses.

korean_quote.text_ko: 해외 통신판매업자통신판매중개업자의 국내대리인 지정 기준을 최초로 구체화하였습니다.
korean_quote.text_en: For the first time, the criteria for overseas online sellers and intermediaries to designate a domestic agent have been specified.
korean_quote.source_title: 전자상거래법 시행령 개정안 입법예고: 해외사업자 국내대리인 지정 기준 공개

gaming.headline_en: New regulations for foreign gaming companies in Korea
summary_en: Foreign game companies must appoint domestic representatives.
Amendments to the Game Industry Promotion Act passed.
Increased penalties for misleading information on items.

impact.rationale_en: The new requirement for foreign companies to appoint domestic representatives increases regulatory complexity and risk.

korean_quote.text_ko: 해외게임사 ‘국내대리인 지정제’, 게임사 역차별 해소 실효성 의문
korean_quote.text_en: Doubts over whether the "domestic agent designation" rule for foreign game firms will effectively end reverse discrimination.

sources.title: South Korean National Assembly passed an amendment to the Game Industry Promotion Act, mandating that foreign game companies appoint a domestic representative
[게임위드인] 확률형 아이템 규제…게임사에 돌아온 부메랑 | 연합뉴스

biotech.headline_en: K-Bio Regulatory Changes Impacting Industry Landscape
summary_en: Recent amendments to the Advanced Regenerative Medicine Act are now in effect.
These changes aim to enhance research, development, and commercialization support.
The regulatory environment is shifting towards a more supportive framework.

impact.rationale_en: The amendments are expected to facilitate easier access to advanced therapies.

korean_quote.text_ko: 이번 제도 변화가 단순한 규제 개편을 넘어 연구개발과 투자, 상용화 구조 전반에 영향을 미칠 것으로 보고 있다.
korean_quote.text_en: This change is seen as going beyond mere regulatory reform to affect R&D, investment, and the whole commercialization structure.
korean_quote.source_title: 첨단재생바이법 개정 본격 시행…바이오 산업 지형 변화 주목

sources.title: 첨단재생바이법 개정 본격 시행…바이오 산업 지형 변화 주목

summary_en: New legislation aims to enhance semiconductor competitiveness.
Government collaborates with industry on export controls.
Recent laws support comprehensive semiconductor industry development.

impact.rationale_en: The introduction of new legislation and export controls increases regulatory scrutiny for foreign companies.

korean_quote.text_ko: 반도체산업 경쟁력 강화 및 지원에 관한 특별법(이하 반도체특별법) 제정안이 29일 국회 본회의를 통과했다.
korean_quote.text_en: The enactment bill of the Special Act on Strengthening and Supporting Semiconductor Industry Competitiveness (the "Semiconductor Special Act") passed the National Assembly plenary on the 29th.

logistics.headline_en: New laws enhance logistics sector in Korea
summary_en: The National Assembly passed the 'International Logistics Promotion Zone' law.
This law aims to establish high-value logistics hubs linked to ports and airports.
Regulatory changes are expected to boost foreign investment in logistics.

impact.rationale_en: The passage of new laws creates a more favorable regulatory environment for logistics.

korean_quote.text_ko: 국회가 항만·공항·철도를 연계한 국제 물류거점 육성을 위한 법적 기반을 마련했다.
korean_quote.text_en: The National Assembly has laid the legal foundation to foster international logistics hubs linking ports, airports, and railways.
korean_quote.source_title: 민홍철 의원 대표발의 '국제물류진흥지역 특별법' 본회의 통과 | 아주경제
